title: Processing
summary: Entry point for conceptual and technical documentation owned by the separate Processing project.
content_html:
Processing

This scope owns conceptual and technical documentation for the Processing work: artwork ideas, recovered project knowledge, sketch and algorithm architecture, authoring and rendering methods, experiments, and implementation reference.

Repository hosting and integration are owned in Studio documentation:

  • Processing defines the ownership boundary and routes to current integration documents.
  • Processing Project Setup records repository shape, environment, lifecycle, and shared-system integration.

Keep project-specific reasoning here even when the corresponding source is hosted under the repository's processing/ root. Repository co-location does not make Processing a website module or transfer its technical documentation to Studio.
